description: During a sales call to upgrade a customer's phone, the customer mentions their current phone has poor battery life.

nodes.task_description: While presenting new phones, acknowledge the battery issue and perform a quick remote diagnostic on the customer's current device.

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs a diagnostic and finds the battery health is critically low.

nodes.task_description: Use the diagnostic result to strengthen the case for upgrading to a new phone.

expected_outcome.value: Agent effectively uses the technical data to support the sales pitch.

nodes.task_description: Process the order for the new phone.
